description: A standalone adventure featuring the team that would become the basis for Chrono Cross. Serge, Kid, and Gil are treasure hunters hired to infiltrate Viper Manor and steal the Frozen Flame.

episodes.name: The Frozen Flame
episodes.description: The main story - the Radical Dreamers infiltrate Viper Manor to steal the legendary Frozen Flame.

chapters.name: The Contract
chapters.description: The party accepts a job from a mysterious client to steal the Frozen Flame.

chapters.name: Infiltrating Viper Manor
chapters.description: The team sneaks into the manor, avoiding guards and traps.

chapters.name: The Treasure Room
chapters.description: Find and claim the Frozen Flame.

chapters.name: Escape
chapters.description: Escape from Viper Manor with the treasure.

episodes.name: Nonsensical
episodes.description: A surreal alternate episode with randomized events and unusual scenarios.

chapters.name: Dream Beginnings
chapters.description: Start in an unfamiliar location with strange events.

chapters.name: Unusual Encounters
chapters.description: Meet unusual characters and face bizarre challenges.

chapters.name: The Endless Staircase
chapters.description: Navigate through an infinite series of rooms.

characters.name: Serge
characters.description: The calm and capable leader of the Radical Dreamers. He wields a sword and leads the party.

characters.name: Kid
characters.description: A skilled thief with a mysterious past. She uses dual blades and has high evasion.

characters.name: Gil
characters.description: A hot-headed magic user who specializes in fire and lightning spells.

characters.name: Mana
characters.description: A mysterious girl with powerful magical abilities. Joins the party later.

characters.name: Karsh
characters.description: A strong warrior with high physical attack. Leader of the opposing group.

characters.name: Zoah
characters.description: A powerful fighter with high HP and defense. Represents the opposite team.

gameplay_modes.description: The main narrative experience with linear progression through Viper Manor.
A surreal alternate mode with randomized encounters and surreal storytelling.

locations.name: Dream Sanctuary
locations.description: A mysterious hub area where the team prepares for missions.

locations.name: Karsh's Castle
locations.description: The fortress of the rival treasure hunting team led by Karsh.

locations.name: Marbule Ruins
locations.description: Ancient ruins with treasure and enemies.

locations.name: Island of the Dead
locations.description: A haunted island with powerful enemies and rare items.

locations.name: Viper Manor (Past)
locations.description: The historical version of Viper Manor, accessible through time travel.

connection_to_chrono_cross.description: Radical Dreamers serves as a prototype for Chrono Cross. Many elements were reused and expanded:
shared_elements: Kid - Thief character, appears in both
Viper Manor - Key location in both games
differences: Radical Dreamers is much shorter (2-3 hours)
No real time travel (uses dream/surreal elements)
Two teams instead of one (Radical Dreamers vs. Karsh's team)

endings.name: Success
endings.description: The team successfully steals the Frozen Flame and escapes.
endings.outcome: Get the Frozen Flame and complete the contract

endings.name: Failure
endings.description: The team is defeated or caught.
